resources.string: So no one else but you can unlock your wallet.
PINs are just as secure as long passwords, but easier to use and remember.
There will be NO Restore PIN button. Make sure you remember it.
Since you are going to be your own bank, we wont be able to help if you lose your PIN.
Too many attempts, please wait for %s

Unfortunately, as we mentioned when you created your PIN, there is no Restore PIN button. However, if you created a backup of your wallet, you can restore it using your recovery phrase. You can also set another PIN once it is restored.
Warning: you can lose your account and assets forever
DO NOT reset if you didn\'t make a backup, as there will be NO WAY to restore your account after you reset.
I have read and am sure about the wallet reset.
To restore a wallet you must memorize the content and order of the phrase words. Make sure you remember the codeword sequence when starting the wallet reset.
To restore a wallet you must have your private key saved securely. Make sure you have the correct private key before starting the wallet restoration.

Consists of 24 single words separated by spaces. If your recovery phrase is shorter than 24 words (i.e. 12, 15, 18 or 21 words) you can still use it to restore your wallet. Just enter as many words as you have in your phrase.
Enter your 12-24 words recovery phrase in the correct order to restore your existing wallet.
Never share your recovery phrase with anyone. Anyone with these words can take your funds forever.
In Mangala wallet you are your own bank. With that great power comes great responsibility.
Back it up, and keep your backup safe
If you lose your wallet backup information, no one can recover it, and you will lose your assets.
If you send assets to the wrong address, no one can reverse or recover that transaction, and you will lose your funds.
Be wary of phishing and scams
If someone offers you something that is too good to be true, it probably is.
Backup your wallet, keep your assets safe

With no backup, losing your device will result in the loss of access forever. In some extremely rare cases, hardware issues with your device can result in corrupted keys, which lead to permanent loss of access too. \nThe only way to guard against losses is to back up your wallet.
Without a backup, you could permanently lose access to your wallet and all your assets. We strongly recommend backing up now.

With Mangala wallet you are your own bank. No one but you has access to your private key. Not even Mangala force. \nWithout a backup, if you lose your device, or even simply delete the app, you will lose your funds forever.
Prepare to write down your recovery phrase
If your device gets lost or stolen, you can restore your wallet using your recovery phrase. \nGet pen and paper before you start.
Write it down on paper. Resist temptation to email it to yourself or screenshot it.
I have kept it somewhere safe
Your wallet is now backed up
DO NOT show your recovery phrase to anyone. Protect it like the ten millions dollars it will one day be worth (probably).
This might take a few moments
Your wallet has been restored successfully
Face ID or Touch ID unlock
Access Mangala wallet with your biometry. \nQuick, easy and secure.

Mangala Wallet app requires that phone has the passcode (screen lock) enabled.

 You may enable it in Android settings.

Please note that when you disabled the PIN on the OS level the security measures in safe storage of your phonе made the previously stored data invalid. You will need to Restore your wallet keys to get back to your wallet.
The address has been copied successfully
Are you sure you want to delete this contact? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the group \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Double check the information and confirm your transaction.
Use accounts to manage your asset stacks separately.
Example: Private funds, Savings account, dApp account, Work funds, Airdrops
Account details have been updated successfully
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing.
We were not able to estimate gas. There might be an error in the contract and this transaction may fail
You need a wallet to hold your assets before you can send them. Add your first wallet and we\'ll get you right back here to complete your transaction.
Scan the QR code or copy the address:
This address does not match the selected network
Please refer to %s for additional details.
Verify transaction failure. Please try again.
We were not able to estimate gas. There might be an error in the contract and this transaction may fail.
Scan QR code to login, send, receive and pay
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

Generating Mangala wallet.
Encrypting your private key using your PIN.
Saving your encrypted keys to a local secure vault on this device.
All done! Your wallet is now ready.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing.
Not enough liquidity for this swap
Not enough %s to pay the network fee
This allows the third party to spend all your token balance until it reaches the cap or you revoke the spending cap. If this is not intended, consider setting a lower spending cap.
Spending cap must bigger or equal swap amount
You want to transfer this NFT
Are you sure you want to delete this contact. You can\'t undo this action.
Warning: you can lose your account and funds forever
Don\'t reset if you didn\'t make a backup, as there will be NO WAY to restore your account after you reset.
Please scan this QR code to sync your account with the UI wallet app
To ensure safety, you must enter your wallet\'s password before activating the Face ID face unlock feature
Amount of RAM to buy in %1$s
An EOS account name is your passport to the EOS blockchain, allowing you to send, receive, and manage digital assets securely.
So you want to create a?
A full 12-character name. Ideal for those who prefer traditional identifiers.
Under 12 characters with a .man suffix for a perfect personalized touch. Easy to remember and share.
Create an account for your friend
You must import an account first.
Length can be shorter than 12 characters
Cannot begin or end with a period, cannot begin with a number
You\'re creating an account of type
Which payment method do you want to use?
Thank you for creating account! \n\nYour %s account is being created and will be ready for you to explore soon.
You\'re all set! 🎉\n\nYour %s account is created successfully, and we’re thrilled to have you join us.
Your %s account was created successfully! 🎉\n\nFor added security, please set up a PIN to protect your account. It only takes a moment!

Your payment for account creation was successful, but we encountered a minor issue during the setup process. We’re working on it and will notify you as soon as possible. Rest assured, your payment is valid, and no further charges are required. We’ll complete your account setup shortly.
Your payment is successful, but we encountered a minor issue during the account creation process. Rest assured, your payment is valid, and no further charges are required
A network error occurred while creating your account, please try again
An unknown error occurred while creating your account, please try again or contact support
Your payment is still processing, please try again later
We couldn\'t process your payment. Please try again later
You have already created an account with this payment
Your payment was cancelled or refunded
There was some issue processing your payment, please try again later
Enter or scan the private key for the account you wish to import.
Pick an account to pay fee
Scan QR code to pay fee
Ask a friend to scan and pay for your account creation. Don\'t worry if your friend created the account successfully but you haven\'t saved it yet. You can still active it later
Select a Resource Provider from the choices below to increase your %s.
Usable each day for the next 30 days.
Usable each day until they are unstaked.

Return staked tokens to your account
after 72-hour wait period.
 Resources obtained from staking
will no longer be available.
Amount of EOS to stake as NET
Amount of KB to rent to REX
Amount of kb to rent from Power Up
Amount of ms to rent from Power Up
Amount of eos to rent via REX
Amount of ms to rent via REX
Start export your private key now
To ensure you can recover your EOS account in case you lose your device, securely back up your Private Key. This is essential to protect your assets.

Do not share your Private Key with anyone. Store it in a secure place, such as a cold wallet or write it down and keep it safe. If you lose your Private Key, you will not be able to access your account.
Never copy your Private Key into messaging apps, email, or store it on online services. These methods are vulnerable to attacks and may put your account at risk.
The private key is not encrypted, please export it carefully and make a safe backup! When backing up the private key, please make sure that no one is around!
Warning: you can lose your account and funds forever
Don\'t delete if you didn\'t make a backup, as there will be NO WAY to restore your account after you delete.
Additional resources %s are required for your account to perform this transaction. Would you like to automatically purchase these resources and proceed?
You are selecting the Network to Pay for Creating Account
. Please select the network you\'d like to use for payment of this account. We are supporting some network below for payment.
You are selecting the token to Pay for Creating Account
Below is your account information and our service fee that you need to pay to create account.
You need to pay us total
There was a problem with payment
We are processing a %s payment to create your account name using cryptocurrency. Please review and confirm the transaction.
Your requesting to create new eos account was executed successfully. We will create account for you and notify you when it is done.
To perform this action, you need to let the smart contract use a specific amount of %s tokens.
You are always in control, and only the approved amount can be accessed.
You need to allow greater than %s
You don't have any account for payment.
The network is not supported for payment.
Unable to get decimals data of the Token you selected for payment.
Calculate total EVM token that you need to pay failed.
Send sign message to pay for new account failed.
Can not estimate gas for payment.
Can not change back to original network.
Congratulations! Your new %s account %s was created successfully.
We can not find your token %s in your account.
You do not have enough %s to pay for this account or for transaction fees.
We couldn't create your %s account %s. Please try again later. If the problem persist, contact support.

You are securely importing your EOS account into Mangala Wallet. This process uses the existing EVM wallet you have already imported into Mangala Wallet. Please select an EVM wallet to proceed. Rest assured, your private information is handled securely, and no additional seed phrases are required for this operation.
Warning: You currently do not have any EVM wallets imported into Mangala Wallet. To import your EOS account, you must first add an EVM wallet to Mangala Wallet.
Your wallet is not linked to any EOS account. Please verify that your wallet corresponds to an EOS-linked account and try again or choose another wallet.
Don’t have a wallet linked to an EOS account? Import a new EVM wallet to continue

We encountered an issue while fetching the EOS account linked to your private key. Please check your network connection and try again. If the problem persists, verify that the private key is correct or contact support for assistance.
Select EOS Private Key to Import

Below are the EOS private keys extracted from your Evm wallet. The Owner Key provides full control over your EOS account, while the Active Key is typically used for everyday transactions and operations. Please select the key you wish to import into your wallet.
* Grants full control, including the ability to recover accounts and manage permissions. Use only in secure, trusted environments.
* Used for day-to-day transactions. Ideal for most users to minimize risk.
Your wallet was already linked to an EOS account. Please verify that your wallet does not correspond to an EOS-linked account and try again or choose another wallet.
An unknown error occurred when submitting your proposal, please try again later
There was an issue writing your proposal data. Check your proposal data input and try again
An error occurred when submitting your proposal\n%1$s
Use up to 12 characters: only a-z and 1-5 and comma '.'
Your entered data will be deleted and cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete this draft proposal?
A draft for proposal %1$s already exists. Do you want to overwrite it?
Save changes to the draft of proposal %1$s?
Save your progress as a draft for this proposal?
Your entered data will be deleted and cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete this action?
No actions found for this account
Use up to 12 characters, and in some rare cases, 13. Only a-z and 1-5 and comma '.'
Use up to 13 characters. Only a-z and 1-5 and comma '.'
Only English letters a-z, numbers 1-5 and comma '.' allowed
Invalid name. Due to system encoding, your entry will be changed to “%1$s”
Invalid number. Enter number from %1$s to %2$s
Enter a valid %1$s bytes (%2$s characters) hexadecimal string e.g. 01abcdef
Enter a valid hexadecimal string e.g. 01abcdef
Enter a valid public key (starts with PUB_K1_ or EOS)
Enter a valid public key (starts with SIG_K1_)
Enter up to 7 all uppercase letters A-Z
Use up to %1$s decimal place(s) for value
Letters (a-z), numbers 0-5 and period (.), 1-13 characters long. E.g. user.man
Public key, starts with EOS or PUB_K1_
Select or type a smart contract name
Waiting for approval. Your proposal has been sent to the designated approval.
Once approved, your proposal can be executed.
Are you sure you want to approve this proposal?
Are you sure you want to unapprove this proposal?
Are you sure you want to cancel this proposal?
Are you sure you want to execute this proposal?
You are selecting the Network to Pay for Creating Account %s. Please select the network you'd like to use for payment of this account. We are supporting some network below for payment
Select an EVM wallet from the list below to create your EOS account. Only wallets not currently linked to an EOS account are shown.
An error occurred, please try again.
You have no accounts. Please create or import an account to create account for your friend
Contains only valid characters (Lowercase letters a-z, digits 1-5): %1$s
To create account on EOS, you need to pay for resources
How would you like to pay it
Do you want to create a new active key?
Warning: this will make a transaction on the network
Create and save new permission success
Search by proposer or proposal name...
Upon activation, Day or Night mode will be followed by device settings.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed dolabore et dolore magna aliqua.
Insufficient RAM. You need to buy at least %.2f KB more RAM to complete this transaction.
Invalid import request (missing account name). Please scan the QR generated in the UI app instead
Please select a blockchain network first
To get started, create a new wallet or import an existing one.
Biometric access, hardware encryption, and Al threat detection.
Smart insights, automated security, and intelligent portfolio management.
One wallet for all your assets
Native Vaulta, full EVM support, and Bitcoin - all in one place.
Your secure gateway to crypto. Create a new wallet or import one you already trust.
Derive a new account from your existing HD wallet
Generate a new wallet with a fresh seed phrase
Import using seed phrase or private key
